Le Mas · Beaucaire

Maison de Maître

The character residence, XXL pool.
10guests
4bedrooms
1XXL pool
✓air conditioning
+ 1 photos

The centrepiece of the estate, the Maison de Maître charms with its volumes and bourgeois character: period cement tiles, arched windows, chandeliers, fireplace and a great convivial table.

Four bedrooms, sleeps ten, and an XXL pool: this is the house for long shared meals, family gatherings and lingering Provençal summers.

Amenities

3 air-conditioned bedrooms
Fibre Wifi
Equipped kitchen
Queen-size beds
13 × 7 m mirror pool
Century-old trees
Private parking
Dishwasher
146 cm smart TV
Hi-Fi system

Dolce Gusto coffee machine
Linen provided
Bikes available
Large garden
BBQ
